source.title: Old-School Essentials raceProfiles compiled from Advanced Fantasy Player's Tome and Carcass Crawler issues
includedSources: OSE Advanced Fantasy Player's Tome v1.3
source.note: Carcass Crawler Issue #6 contains new dwarf classes but no separate raceProfiles. Issue #4 likewise adds halfling classes rather than separate raceProfiles. Duplicate race presentations were normalized, with the latest available version used where later issues update a race.

racialAbilities.name: string
racialAbilities.effect: string

raceProfiles.name: Dwarf
raceProfiles.sourceBook: OSE Advanced Fantasy Player's Tome v1.3
raceProfiles.description: Stout underground demihumans known for craft, stubbornness, and resilience.

racialAbilities.name: Combat Restrictions
racialAbilities.effect: Can only use small or normal-sized weapons; cannot use longbows or two-handed swords.

racialAbilities.name: Detect Construction Tricks
racialAbilities.effect: 2-in-6 chance to detect new construction, sliding walls, or sloping passages when searching.

racialAbilities.name: Detect Room Traps
racialAbilities.effect: 2-in-6 chance to detect non-magical room traps when searching.

racialAbilities.name: Infravision
racialAbilities.effect: Can see in darkness to 60'.

racialAbilities.name: Listening at Doors
racialAbilities.effect: 2-in-6 chance to hear noises.

racialAbilities.name: Resilience
racialAbilities.effect: Bonus to saves versus poison, spells, and magic wands/rods/staves based on CON.

raceProfiles.name: Elf
raceProfiles.sourceBook: OSE Advanced Fantasy Player's Tome v1.3
raceProfiles.description: Slender, fey demihumans with long lifespans, keen senses, and love of nature and magic.

racialAbilities.name: Detect Secret Doors
racialAbilities.effect: When actively searching, detects hidden and secret doors on 2-in-6.

racialAbilities.name: Immunity to Ghoul Paralysis
racialAbilities.effect: Unaffected by paralysis inflicted by ghouls.

racialAbilities.name: Infravision
racialAbilities.effect: Can see in darkness to 60'.

racialAbilities.name: Listening at Doors
racialAbilities.effect: 2-in-6 chance to hear noises.

raceProfiles.name: Gnome
raceProfiles.sourceBook: OSE Advanced Fantasy Player's Tome v1.3
raceProfiles.description: Small tunnellers and machine-makers, cousins of dwarves, with affinity for burrowing mammals.

racialAbilities.name: Combat Restrictions
racialAbilities.effect: Armour must be tailored to small size; weapons must be appropriate to stature; cannot use longbows or two-handed swords.

racialAbilities.name: Defensive Bonus
racialAbilities.effect: +2 AC when attacked by opponents greater than human-sized.

racialAbilities.name: Detect Construction Tricks
racialAbilities.effect: 2-in-6 chance to detect new construction, sliding walls, or sloping passages when searching.

racialAbilities.name: Infravision
racialAbilities.effect: Can see in darkness to 90'.

racialAbilities.name: Listening at Doors
racialAbilities.effect: 2-in-6 chance to hear noises.

racialAbilities.name: Magic Resistance
racialAbilities.effect: Bonus to saves versus spells and magic wands/rods/staves based on CON.

racialAbilities.name: Speak with Burrowing Mammals
racialAbilities.effect: Knows the secret language of burrowing mammals such as badgers and moles.

raceProfiles.name: Half-Elf
raceProfiles.sourceBook: OSE Advanced Fantasy Player's Tome v1.3
raceProfiles.description: Rare offspring of humans and elves, blending human robustness and elven features.

racialAbilities.name: Detect Secret Doors
racialAbilities.effect: When actively searching, detects hidden and secret doors on 2-in-6.

racialAbilities.name: Infravision
racialAbilities.effect: Can see in darkness to 60'.

raceProfiles.name: Hobbit
raceProfiles.sourceBook: OSE Advanced Fantasy Player's Tome v1.3
raceProfiles.description: Small, friendly demihumans who love home comforts and are surprisingly nimble marksmen.

racialAbilities.name: Combat Restrictions
racialAbilities.effect: Armour must be tailored to small size; weapons must be appropriate to stature; cannot use longbows or two-handed swords.

racialAbilities.name: Defensive Bonus
racialAbilities.effect: +2 AC when attacked by opponents greater than human-sized.

racialAbilities.name: Initiative Bonus
racialAbilities.effect: If individual initiative is used, gains +1 to initiative rolls.

racialAbilities.name: Listening at Doors
racialAbilities.effect: 2-in-6 chance to hear noises.

racialAbilities.name: Missile Attack Bonus
racialAbilities.effect: +1 to attack rolls with all missile weapons.

racialAbilities.name: Resilience
racialAbilities.effect: Bonus to saves versus poison, spells, and magic wands/rods/staves based on CON.

raceProfiles.name: Half-Orc
raceProfiles.sourceBook: OSE Advanced Fantasy Player's Tome v1.3
raceProfiles.description: Rare offspring of orcs and humans, often outcast from both cultures.

racialAbilities.name: Infravision
racialAbilities.effect: Can see in darkness to 60'.

raceProfiles.name: Human
raceProfiles.sourceBook: OSE Advanced Fantasy Player's Tome v1.3
raceProfiles.description: The most flexible and unrestricted race, defined by ambition, passion, and adaptability.

racialAbilities.name: Flexible Advancement
racialAbilities.effect: Can select any non-demihuman class and advance without level limits.

racialAbilities.name: Leadership
racialAbilities.effect: Retainers and mercenaries gain +1 loyalty and morale.

notes: Optional racial abilities are recommended only if demihuman class/level restrictions are lifted.
